title: atropis distans
intro: Atropis distans, also known as Japanese angelica or atropis, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. Atropis distans has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Atropis distans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and promote digestive health. Atropis distans can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
